name: traceable-research
description: Traceable Evidence Synthesis Toolkit for evidence-first research and decision-ready briefs.

interface.longDescription: Turn ambiguous questions into traceable, source-grounded, decision-ready briefs.
defaultPrompt: Use T.E.S.T. to research this question and produce a decision-ready brief.
Use T.E.S.T. to fact-check this claim, including conflicting evidence.
